name: Twitter / X
description: Let agents monitor posts, draft replies, or manage social updates through a provider connector.
keywords: Prepare the Twitter/X account, app, and scopes the agent should use.
Configure the API or MCP in the agent host, not in a prompt.
Add this building once the external connector is ready.

access.label: External connector
access.detail: Requires Twitter/X API access or an MCP connector configured in the agent provider. Local terminal agents do not receive social credentials from Vibe Research.

capabilities.name: MCP
capabilities.detail: Environment variable referenced by Twitter / X setup notes.

capabilities.name: API
capabilities.detail: Environment variable referenced by Twitter / X setup notes.

capabilities.name: Twitter / X MCP
capabilities.detail: Requires Twitter/X API access or an MCP connector configured in the agent provider. Local terminal agents do not receive social credentials from Vibe Research.

steps.title: Create API access
steps.detail: Prepare the Twitter/X account, app, and scopes the agent should use.

steps.title: Connect the provider
steps.detail: Configure the API or MCP in the agent host, not in a prompt.

steps.title: Install the building
steps.detail: Add this building once the external connector is ready.
